architectureNotes: Flexi is a LAYOUT (widget name 'Flexi', dataType 'layout-7', isDroppable:true), NOT an assessment widget. 'layout-7' is absent from support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES, so resolveDropTarget routes it to the canvas — it drops onto the Instructions-for-Students page (#desktop_view) via cy.dropComponent('Flexi'), not into a Generic Step column.
Canvas wrapper is .customClass[data-type="layout-7"] containing .layout-container.layout-7 ([layout-flexi-template]). Flexi uses templates/layout-flexi/ (NOT templates/layouts/).

DYNAMIC columns: .flexi-columns > .column.flexi-section, one per fieldData.settings.flexiData entry, width driven by section.width%. flexiData starts empty so a separator-count dialog (.tableGO-rows-columns-dialog, shown when fieldData.noOfRows < 0) prompts for vertical separators; .icon-Up/.icon-Down step the count and the Create button (onSeparatorCreate) builds the columns.

Each column holds .flexi-column → .question-container-box.flexi-container-box → .question-container slots with .column-content.flexi-box.editables drop zones and .empty-droppable-text.flexi-empty-draggble placeholders.

Settings panel is #layout-flexi-template-setting (.flexi-layout-setting-panel): a Column Ratio section with per-column editable % boxes (#row-{{$index}}) + Update button (.update-size), a Full Width checkbox (.layout-width-setup), and an Alt Text textarea (maxlength 2000) under .accessibilityDiv-flexi. Full Width sets data-pagemargin='fullwidth'.

Runtime input-validation (alpha/decimal/negative/3-digit/min-10%/auto-adjust on the ratio boxes), nested child-drop rules, runtime resize, Preview/Reader/Publish, media/tables/math/special-languages, multipart, persistence-after-reload, refresh and CLP outline/separator display are deferred.
notYetLiveVerified: Selectors are source-derived from flexi-layout.html + flexi-layout-setting-panel.html + flexi-layout-directive.js but NOT yet run against a live authoring instance. A single headed run will confirm the drop, separator dialog, dynamic-column and settings-panel selectors.
